specSection:
initProject :: () → ()
initProject() =
  | exists("backlog/") → skip   -- already initialised
  | otherwise          → backlog init <projectName> --defaults --agent-instructions none

-- Answer vocabulary: which branch fires given the Environment State below?
--   "skip" — backlog/ already exists
--   "init" — backlog/ does not exist, run backlog init
ground_truth_rationale: backlog/ directory already exists (backlogDirExists: true), so initProject takes the 'exists(backlog/)' branch and skips initialization. Clear SKIP case.
